title: Losses question L1
description: How to complete the losses question L1 in your paper tax return.

child_links.title: L1 Tax losses of earlier income years 2017
child_links.description: Complete question L1 if you have a tax loss from an earlier year that you may be able to claim a deduction this year.

child_links.title: Taxable income or loss 2017
child_links.description: Complete this question to declare your total taxable income or loss.
